dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8610 IH: Sudan Waiver Report Reduction Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fallon (for himself and Mr. Walkinshaw) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To amend the Sudan Accountability and Divestment Act of 2007 to require agency reports on any procurement waiver made by the President.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Sudan Waiver Report Reduction Act.

section.header: Reporting requirement with respect to waivers granted under the Sudan Accountability and Divestment Act of 2007
section.text: Section 6(c)(2) of the Sudan Accountability and Divestment Act of 2007 (Public Law 110–174; 50 U.S.C. 1701 note) is amended to read as follows:

paragraph.text: Not later than 30 days after the President grants a waiver under paragraph (1), the head of the executive agency concerned shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report on such waiver.
